title: Beef Stew Russian Style
description: A hearty beef stew with a rich, velvety sauce, inspired by traditional Russian cuisine.
instructions: Brown the beef in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Remove the beef from the pot and set it aside.
Add the stew to the pot and bring it to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the browned beef back to the pot and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, mix together the velvety and salty.
Add the velvety mixture to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the pot to the heat and bring it to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
Season the stew with the russian and serve hot.
